summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 6 features. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for all new features: 'Masa' naming (not 'Stol'), venue grouping on active tables, service charge display per-order and in bill summary, image upload for menu items, customer page redesign with compact layout and images, session deletion with cascade, and security headers.

issues: Missing aria-describedby attribute for accessibility (console warning) - minor, inherited from previous iterations

critical_code_review_comments: All 'Stol' references replaced with 'Masa' - verified in sidebar and throughout UI
Venue grouping on Active Tables page working - sessions grouped under venue name headers (e.g., '9Lar Kabinetlər')
Service charge displayed per-order in session details modal (e.g., 'Xidmət haqqı (10%)' = +5.61 AZN)
Service charge included in bill summary on session close with service_charge_percentage field
Image upload for menu items working - drag/drop area with 'Şəkil seçin (max 5MB)' in item form
Customer page redesigned with compact layout, images, search bar, category filters, and cart bottom sheet
Session deletion with cascade working - deletes session, orders, and timed_services
Security headers present on all responses (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection)
Settings page allows editing service charge percentage with PIN protection
seed_data_creation: Created test session with order for service charge verification (session was closed and deleted during testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 6 features tested and working. Key pages: Active Tables at /admin (default) with venue grouping and service charge in session details, Settings at /admin/settings with service charge editing (requires PIN 1234), Menu Management at /admin/menu-management with image upload in item dialog, Customer page at /customer/{tableId} with compact redesign. Security headers middleware added. Session deletion cascade working via DELETE /api/sessions/{session_id}.

features_tested.masa_naming: PASS - All 'Stol' replaced with 'Masa' in sidebar and UI
features_tested.venue_grouping: PASS - Active tables grouped by venue name (e.g., '9Lar Kabinetlər')
features_tested.service_charge_per_order: PASS - Displayed in session details modal as 'Xidmət haqqı (10%)'
features_tested.service_charge_in_bill_summary: PASS - close_session returns service_charge_percentage in bill_summary
features_tested.image_upload_api: PASS - POST /api/upload/image returns id, path, url
features_tested.image_upload_ui: PASS - Drag/drop area in menu item form with 'Şəkil seçin (max 5MB)'
features_tested.customer_page_redesign: PASS - Compact layout with images, search, categories, cart bottom sheet
features_tested.session_deletion_cascade: PASS - DELETE /api/sessions/{session_id} deletes session, orders, timed_services
features_tested.session_delete_button_ui: PASS - Delete button (trash icon) visible on closed sessions
features_tested.settings_service_charge: PASS - Settings page allows editing service_charge_percentage

api_endpoints_tested: DELETE /api/sessions/{session_id} - PASS (cascade deletes orders and timed_services)

elements: Summary cards (Məkan, Sifariş, Endirim, Xidmət haqqı, Cəmi)
Order list with service charge per order
Maliyyə Ayarları card with Xidmət Haqqı (%) input
Item dialog with Şəkil upload area
